mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_deletion_requests (target_user_id, requester_id, status, reason, created_at) VALUES (#{targetUserId}, #{requesterId}, #{status}, #{reason}, #{createdAt})
mapper.select: SELECT id, target_user_id, requester_id, status, reason, reviewed_by, reviewed_at, created_at FROM user_deletion_requests WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1
SELECT id, target_user_id, requester_id, status, reason, reviewed_by, reviewed_at, created_at FROM user_deletion_requests ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_deletion_requests WHERE status = #{status}
